LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR #11604

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY WITH ARBITRATION AWARD (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S PETITION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON.
Appearances: Jonathan D. Robbins of Morgan Stanley Smith Barney (693.6215) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances.
